zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多，关注关键支撑与突破压力
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD价格在92.2附近波动，日内涨幅微弱，仅0.49%，显示市场短期多空力量相对平衡。从价格结构看，20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)位于91.85下方，价格略高于均线，暗示短期存在轻微上行动能，但趋势尚不明朗。  

MACD显示0.504的正值，虽缺乏信号线数据，但正值区域通常提示买方占优，若快线突破潜在信号线，可能形成进一步多头确认。价格短期高点92.71构成初步阻力，低点91.57为支撑，震荡区间约1.1美元，操作上宜关注突破或回踩机会。  

支撑位91.5-91.6区间若有效守住，可视为短期买入区域；阻力位92.7-93附近则为潜在获利减仓点。若价格上破93并伴随成交量放大，多头趋势可能延续至95附近。相反，若跌破91.5，则需警惕回调至90甚至89。  

交易策略上，可采取区间操作为主，逢低布局多单、逢高轻仓减仓，同时密切关注均线和MACD动态变化。稳健投资者可等待明显突破确认后再加仓，以降低短期震荡带来的风险。

Price action shows a consolidation phase following a broader downtrend, with the market attempting to establish a base after recent weakness. This sideways movement suggests indecision, but holding above short-term moving averages signals early recovery potential as buyers gradually regain control.

> Solana price prediction: Fed meeting, rate-cut delay Solana (SOL) trades near $90 on 13 March 2026 as markets watch the Fed’s 17–18 March meeting, Goldman’s delayed rate-cut call, and Solana’s planned Alpenglow upgrade. Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results. Explore third-party SOL price targets and technical analysis.
  

From a trading perspective, the setup favors a range-bound strategy with a slight bullish tilt. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk controls below $89, targeting the $96–$100 zone. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed move above $96 with volume expansion. Conversely, failure to hold $90 could trigger renewed downside pressure, making risk management essential in this still fragile recovery phase.
